def choose_mode(payload, mode):
    if mode == "fast":
        return "fast"
    return "default"


def orchestrate(payload):
    validate_payload(payload)
    process_payload(payload)
    return payload


def load_document(path):
    if not path:
        raise ValueError("missing path")
    return load_cached_document(path)


def close_pair(first, second):
    with first:
        first.write("left")
    with second:
        second.write("right")
